title: Green Haze Sky Overlay
description: Sky Overlay that looks like the northern lights!
body:
**Pack Overview:**

This resource pack replaces the sky with an image of a starry night sky with a green hue.

For this resource pack to perform properly, you must use Optifine or any other mods that allow custom skies.

**Minecraft Settings:**

Custom skies: On

Sky: Off

**_If skybox doesn't work, relaunch Minecraft_**
